docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY RODRIGUEZ, CESAR AS TO DEFENDANT TILLEMAN, BRITTANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-27-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$49.50) SERVED APR-28-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TILLEMAN, BRITTANY
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT TILLEMAN, BRITTANY
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL-
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-27-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-21-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-21-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-21-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, CESAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TILLEMAN, BRITTANY $5,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $124.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,624.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 6/24/11 TO BRITTANY TILLEMAN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TILLEMAN, BRITTANY
